title: lespedeza × intermixta
intro: Lespedeza × intermixta is a hybrid plant species, a cross between Lespedeza bicolor and Lespedeza cuneata, commonly known as the bush clover. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Lespedeza × intermixta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
